About Us

Our story

Isaiyana School is a faith-centered community committed to nurturing joyful learners, strong character, and well-rounded achievement. Our curriculum, boarding life, and pastoral care work together to shape students who thrive in school and in life.

Our Story

Isaiyana School blends academic excellence with strong Christian values. We nurture every learner with caring teachers, modern facilities, and a community that celebrates growth.

Vision

To form confident, capable young leaders who flourish academically, spiritually, and socially in a world full of possibility.

Mission

To deliver a balanced education rooted in faith, creativity, community, and lifelong learning that empowers every child to succeed.

Core values

CharacterCompassionCuriosityCreativityCommunityCourageChrist-CenteredCollaboration
Head Teacher

Head Teacher's message

“Education is the gift of a confident future.”

At Isaiyana, every child is seen, encouraged, and prepared with love. We build character alongside knowledge, and we celebrate each learner’s growth.

Why Choose Us

Learning built on faith, CBC, and boarding excellence.

Faith & Values

Daily worship, scripture integration, and a strong moral compass guide every student’s journey.

CBC Curriculum

A fresh, competency-based program that builds skills, confidence, and real-world readiness.

Boarding Care

Safe, comfortable dorms and a nurturing home away from home for boys and girls.

Experienced Teachers

Skilled educators who personalize learning and inspire every learner to grow.

Modern Facilities

Science labs, ICT hubs, creative studios, and sports fields designed for active learning.

Holistic Growth

Balanced academics, spirituality, arts, and wellbeing prepare students for life beyond school.

Academics

Structured stages for every learner.

Foundational learning with phonics, numeracy, Christian values, world awareness and play-based creativity.

LiteracyNumeracyBible StudyArtsPENature Learning
Teaching approach

Active CBC learning with values, creativity, and practical skills.

Teachers guide every child through inquiry, teamwork, faith-based reflection, and real-world application.

Facilities

Spaces designed for learning, care, and growth.

Classrooms

Bright, flexible spaces for collaborative learning and quiet study.

Science Lab

Hands-on experiments with modern lab equipment and safety support.

ICT Suite

Connected learning with computers, coding, and digital tools for every child.

Dining Hall

Healthy meals served in a welcoming space for students and staff.

Playground

Safe outdoor play areas built for games, sports, and joyful movement.

Medical Bay

A calm care room with trained staff and emergency support available daily.

Admissions

Join the Isaiyana family.

  • Completed application form
  • Birth certificate copy
  • Medical clearance and immunization record
  • Previous school report (where available)
  • Boarding agreement for residential learners

Fees are published annually. Contact admissions for package details, sibling discounts, and payment plans.

Enquire

Reach out online or by phone to start your application.

Visit

See our campus on a guided school tour.

3

Apply

Submit forms, documents, and any boarding preferences.

4

Assessment

We invite learners to a friendly assessment and interview.

5

Welcome

Receive confirmation and start your school journey with us.

Extracurriculars

Clubs, sports and creative teams for every interest.

Sports

Football, netball, athletics and active games for skill, teamwork, and fun.

Christian Union

A supportive fellowship for prayer, worship, and character formation.

Scouting

Outdoor challenges, leadership drills, and service-minded adventure.

Music & Drama

Creative expression through choir, drama, and stage performance.

ICT Club

Coding, robotics, and digital creativity for future-ready learners.

Isaiyana Elite Primary & Junior School

Our Promise

"To provide high-quality, Christ-centred education — equipping learners with knowledge, good discipline, and moral uprightness."

— School Mission Statement

"Train up a child in the way he should go; even when he is old he will not depart from it." — Proverbs 22:6
